prompt: Pause the strategy, preserve the record, alert legal and compliance, and prepare a self-report path instead of continuing the trading play.
summary: Tim Belden orders an immediate pause to the California trading strategy, directs preservation of all records, and instructs notification of Legal and Compliance with preparation of a self-report; the Portland desk acknowledges and executes preservation and notification actions.

messages.subject: URGENT — Pause CA trading; preserve records and notify Legal/Compliance
messages.body_text:
Effective immediately:

1) Pause the California trading strategy — halt execution and do not initiate any CA-related trades or replacement plays.

2) Preserve all records related to this activity: do not delete any e-mails, database entries, word-processing files or fragments, spreadsheets, calendars, scheduling data, trade logs, or other electronic data. Create snapshots/backups where feasible.

3) Alert Legal and Compliance now and copy me on those notifications.

4) Prepare a self-report packet (chronology, list of executed and cancelled trades with timestamps and counterparties, relevant communications and attachments, system/log exports). Hold the packet for counsel review and do not circulate externally.

Acknowledge receipt and confirm when the hold and preservation steps are complete.
messages.rationale: Tim Belden, responding to the California AG order referenced earlier in the thread, issues a direct escalation to the trading desk to stop activity, preserve records, and involve Legal/Compliance—implementing the user's directive to pause the trading play and prepare a self-report.

messages.subject: Re: URGENT — Pause CA trading; preservation and Legal/Compliance notified
messages.body_text:
Acknowledged.

Actions taken now:
- Trading hold implemented for CA-related books; queued orders cancelled and automated execution suspended.
- Preservation initiated: desk mailboxes preserved, trade logs and order books exported, database and file-share snapshots created. No deletions performed.
- Legal and Compliance have been notified and copied on this message.
- Drafting self-report packet (chronology, trades, timestamps, communications, system logs). Will deliver initial packet to Legal within 2 hours for counsel review.

We will not resume trading or remove any materials until explicitly cleared by Legal. Please advise if you want an immediate call with Legal/Compliance.
messages.rationale: Portland desk confirms receipt and lists concrete preservation and notification steps, plus a timeline for preparing the self-report—demonstrating compliance with the pause and escalation ordered by Tim Belden.

top_subjects: Re: URGENT — Pause CA trading; preservation and Legal/Compliance notified
URGENT — Pause CA trading; preserve records and notify Legal/Compliance
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
